## New Algorithm: `<id>`

### Checklist
- [ ] Added `algorithms/<category>/<id>.md` with valid frontmatter
- [ ] All required fields present: `id`, `name`, `full`, `category`, `year`, `affiliation`, `paper`, `connects`
- [ ] `category` is one of: `foundation` / `reasoning` / `report` / `agentic` / `alignment`
- [ ] `connects` lists at least one existing algorithm id
- [ ] `## Core Idea` section written in English
- [ ] Ran `python build.py` locally — no errors
